violations.text: Doors to the outside, located in the kitchen area, were observed not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2026
The large walk in cooler was observed with one blower fan in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2026
The bottom shelf of the prep table located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the blower fans in walk in cooler by the dish machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-Food contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2026

The ceiling above the large kettle in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Correct by 1/15/26 The coving in walk in cooler 5 was observed in poor repair. Physical facilities must be maintained. 2/8/26 The floor throughout the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2027

The dishwasher was observed with an extension cord running through ceiling, to outlet on other side of wall. Dishwasher was taken out of service at the time of inspection. Establishment is to wash, rinse, and sanitize in 3-bay sink until dishwasher is serviced. The staging walk-in gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
The ceiling throughout the establishment is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

Brown gravy, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Per PIC, gravy was cooked yesterday around 6pm and was observed between 47-52 DF at the time of inspection. Gravy was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025

The door to the outside, located in the walk-in cooler #10, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The ceiling tiles, and floor throughout the establishment is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to work to obtain options and quotes for repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2025

The upstairs storage area, and the dry storage area have an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep table in the kitchen was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024

The ceiling tiles, and floor throughout the establishment is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to work to obtain options and quotes for repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025

Walk in Cooler number 4 was observed held at 58 degrees Fahrenheit. Food items were observed between 50-58 degrees Fahrenheit. held Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were voluntarily disposed of (Deli Turkey, Deli Cheese, Cooked Carrots, Salami, String Cheese, Pasta salad, and French toast) New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

The door to the outside, located in the walk in cooler 10, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the mixer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2024
Walk in number four was observed with a leak in the ceiling. Establishments must be free of leaks. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2024

The floor throughout the establishment is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to work to obtain options and quotes for repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024

Shellstock tags were not kept in chronological order and were lacking date and time of last used. Establishment is to put shell stock tags in order and start putting date and time of last used. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023

The door to the outside located by the dishwasher was left open, entry door ways must be kept closed to protect against the entry of rodents, birds and insects. Corrected on Site. The door to the outside, located in the Walk in cooler 10, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2023
Freezer door gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the High temp dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023

The prep sinks are lacking air gaps. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2023
The condensate from the walk in freezer was observed in excess around the door. Condensate build up must be eliminated. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2023
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to review options for repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024

The door to the outside, located in the cooler 10, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Through interview with person in charge there is a service order in place to have this door repaired. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2023

Ribs were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by small flies in the dish area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is in the process of installing insect control devices and is continuing to work with Pest Control. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2023

Refrigerator door gaskets on the freezer were observed in poor repair. Establishment has ordered new gaskets to replace damaged gaskets. Cooler 4 is missing a blower cover. Blower cover must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The non-food contact surfaces of the blowers in cooler 1 have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023

The floors in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The ceiling tiles in the kitchens area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The coving in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2023
